name: get_itinerary
description: Load the traveler's active booking and disruption flags (flight_cancelled, hotel_conflict). Call at the start of the recovery call. Pass session_id 'active' unless you know a specific id.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: Booking session id, or 'active' for the disrupted booking

name: place_hotel_phone_call
description: REQUIRED ACTION that actually phones the hotel. Saying 'I am calling' does nothing; you MUST invoke this tool after approval. Set contact_mode to stay_on_line to block while the traveler holds, or callback to start the hotel call asynchronously and automatically call the traveler back afterward.

parameters.name: contact_mode
parameters.description: Required: stay_on_line if traveler chose hold, or callback if traveler chose hang up and callback

parameters.name: flight_detail
parameters.description: Short rebooked flight phrase, e.g. AA1234 6:05am

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: One-line negotiation goal for the hotel agent
